info.title: dotnet-subset
info.description:
dotnet-subset is a .NET tool that copies a subset of files from a repository to a directory.

The tool is mainly used in Dockerfiles to optimize the docker build caching for "dotnet restore" instructions.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: .NET Tool to copy a subset of files from a repository to a directory.

commands.name: restore
commands.description: Create a subset for the restore operation.
